answer.en: JavaScript minification removes comments, whitespace, and optionally renames local variables to shorter names, reducing file size while preserving functionality.
Yes. Minified JavaScript runs identically to the original. Only whitespace and comments are affected by basic minification.
Yes. Use the JavaScript Beautifier tool to format minified JavaScript for readability. However, renamed variable names cannot be recovered.

question.en: Should I minify JavaScript for production?

answer.en: Yes. Minified JavaScript loads faster. Most modern build tools (webpack, Rollup, esbuild, Vite) do this automatically.
